raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "33. Irrag to Paganu Dee-
wi itkatrs fatvu Semini isglah-
bis/ no to Affirenu kehnina
Rohkas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "34. Kur irr tee Deewi no Ee-
mata un no Arwadas? kur irr
tee Deewi no Sewarwaim/ Ee-
nas un Iwas? irrag tee Sama-
riju no mannas Rohkas isglah-
buscht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "35. Kurri starp wiſſeem Dee-
weemi tahs Semmes/ irr fatwu
Semini no mannas Rohkas at-
pestijſchi ? ka tam KU NGAM
bij Jerusalemi no mannas Roh-
las atpestiht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "36. Bet tee Landis zeete kluſ-
fu/ un ne atbildeja tam ne ween-
nu Wahrdn / jo tas kehniasch
bij pawehſeis/ un fazzijſ : Jums
ne buhs atbildeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "37. Tad nahze Eliakimis If-
kijus Dehls tas Aumeisteris/ un
Sebena tas Skrihweris/ un Jo-
aks Aſapa Dehls tas Kanzleris/
pee Ifkiju ar faplohttahm Dreh-
behn/ un stahſtija winxam Rab-
skus Wahrdus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "1. Ad nu tas kehniasch
Ifkijus to dsirdeja/ fa-
plohtiia wiſſch fawas
Drehbes/ un apwilke Maisu / un
gahje ta KUNGA Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. pehz fuhtiia wiſſch Elija-
kimu to Aumeisteri/ un Sebenu
to Skrihwerti/ un tohs wezzakus
Preesterus ar Maisuem apfegtus/
pee to Praweetu Esaiju Amoza
Dehlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Un tee fazzija us to: Ta-
fakka Ifkijus : Schi Deena irr
Behdu Deena/ un Lammascha-
nas Deena/ un Saimofchanas
Deena. Jo tee Behrni irr us
Dsiniſchanu nahknſchi/un Speh-
ka newaid dseindeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Jaschu tas KUNGS taws
Deews wiſſus Wahrdus Rab-
skus dsirdehs/ ko winna Kungs
tas kehniasch no Affirijas fuh-
tijs irr / to dsihwu Deewu ap-
mebdiht/ un ar Wahrdeem lam-
naht/ ko tas KUNGS taws
Deewsiir dsirdejs/tapehz zellces/
un luhs par teem Atliftufcheem/
fas wehl atrohdahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Un ta kehnina Ifkijus Kal-
pi nahze pee Esaiju /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Un Esaijus fazzija us teem:
Ta buhs jums tawam Kungam
fazziht : Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Ne bihstees par teem Wahrdeem/
ko tu effi dsirdejs/ ar ko ta keh-
nina no Affirijas Sullaini mann
tr satinojſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Raugi/ Es dohſchu tam
tah.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
